Should flag

Invitation protocol

"The Future Is Admitted"

Repeated tracked labels carry the hierarchy instead of a stronger structure.

Preview sequence

"A Private Rehearsal"

The same scaffolding appears again before another section heading.

Access window

"Reviewed, Not Sold"

The pattern is now the page's default section grammar.

Material briefing

"Touch the Future"

Four repeated kickers should be enough to flag the page-level smell.

Should pass

Home / Journal

"Breadcrumb Before Heading"

Home

"Form Heading Is Separate"

  1. Step 01

    "Step Indicator"

    Step indicators in ordered flows should not count as section scaffolding.

Lowercase label

"Normal Case Kicker"

Not uppercase, not the repeated AI section-label pattern.

Archive code

"Intentional Brand Label"

Deliberate brand systems can opt out with an explicit marker.

Suite

"Garden Suite"

Repeated category labels inside cards are structured metadata, not page-section scaffolding.

Suite

"Sea Loft"

The label is useful because the user is scanning sibling cards.

Suite

"Cliff Suite"

Repeating it here does not create the generic section-kicker smell.

Create

"/impeccablecraft"

Carousel slides can repeat category labels as navigational taxonomy.

Evaluate

"/impeccableaudit"

The slash command heading identifies an item, not a page section.

Harden

"/impeccablepolish"

The label is a category chip for a selectable command slide.

Amalfi Coast

"Mockup Hero Variant One"

Amalfi Coast

"Mockup Hero Variant Two"

Amalfi Coast

"Mockup Hero Variant Three"
